status.recipeName: TikTok tortilla wrap hack (Crunchwrap supreme edition)
status.goal: Full-length bilingual-friendly streaming track (~2–3 minutes) plus 45–90s vertical excerpt aligning with TikTok quadrant fold + skillet blister storyline
status.targetDuration: 2–3 minutes (full); excerpt sized for Recipe2Video vertical assembly

fields.title: Quarterfold Heat
fields.styleOfMusic: Neon diner funk-pop with chewy slap bass, crispy claps layered like chip snaps, dry shaker percussion echoing cumin dust, shimmering synth ribbons for melted cheese motifs, restrained four-on-the-floor kick tailored to short-form vertical edits, pastel vocoder harmonies only as airy pads (no lyrical vocoder leads), sparkly hi-hats, warm analog pad swells bridging sections, buttery mix with tactile transient emphasis on snaps and hats to mirror kitchen ASMR, minimal reverb tails for intimacy., funk pop, diner groove, sparkly electronic
fields.excludeStyles: No aggressive trap 808 distortions at club excess, no death metal screaming, no lo-fi hiss wall hiding detail, no children’s choir gimmick, no church organ funeral drama, no real artist imitation, no brand shoutouts or fast-food trademark names, no recipe-quantity tutorial lyrics, no spoken ASMR narration, no obvious platform text-to-speech voicing gimmick, no somber ballad lethargy that kills kinetic fold energy.
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English lyrics for a joyous unicorn mascot cooking accordion-style quarter-fold loaded tortilla wedges. Use ONLY lyrics plus section tags; never explain the meta prompt. Absolutely NO genre, production, instrument, mix, or vocal-direction instructions embedded in lyric lines.
Avoid recipe-tutorial modes: forbid measurements, numbered steps, or ingredient tallying. Absolutely NO protected brand names, restaurant chains, hashtags, apps, social platform names in text.
Mood kinetic, neon-diner sparkly, triumphant tactile joy without baby-talk gibberish.
Lyric craftsmanship: clipped sing-song couplets, internal rhymes anchored on tactile imagery, repeatable chorus hook revolving around invented metaphor "Quarterfold" as mnemonic for the viral hinged-fold geometry—not a literal instruction checklist.
Weave multisensory food imagery organically: brittle chip crumble thunder, cumin snow on sizzling beef, sour cream tides cradling crisp stacks, multicolor shredded cheese blizzards, triangular puck compression, leopard-gold tortilla blisters hissing on black glass induction, filament cheese bridges snapping, prism crunch chewing coda synced to satisfied exhale metaphors—not literal tutorial lines.
Required vocabulary seeds (scatter naturally throughout, do not cram in one stanza): quarterfold, Quarterfold lyric hook motif, prism crunch, hinge, constellation, cumin snow, brittle stacks, leopard gold, tether snap, mascot halo.
Structural scaffolding hints (adapt freely but keep labeled sections):
[Verse 1] Whispery reveal of tortilla canvas + phantom hinge incision language + chip electricity before heat.
[Pre-Chorus] Build stacking compass imagery aligning vegetal jewels + creamy harbors prepping fold tension.
[Chorus] Big chantable triumphant Quarterfold chorus hook chant with mirrored internal rhyme; repeat hook enough for vertical short-form truncation.
[Verse 2] Spice snowfall glazing savory grains + palm compress sealing puck energy until skillet ignition glimpsed lyrically.
[Bridge] Halftime ethereal sensory bridge focusing blister tides + filament bridges snapping without jargon math.
[Final Chorus] Reignite chorus hook hotter + mascot halo payoff language echoing triumphant plating breath.

Keep total character count safely under Suno lyric engine limits (~3000) while guaranteeing chorus hook survives isolated 45–90 second vertical excerpt editing.
fields.shortVersionPlan: Open with Chorus hook acapella swell under chip-snap Percussion sting (0–8s); insert trimmed Verse 1 lines focusing hinge-cut imagery syncing to tortilla macro in edit; slam into full Chorus aligning with quadrant color fills + fold montage inside Seedance stitch; Bridge instrumental shimmer under skillet blister macro; revisit Final Chorus over cross-section cheese pull + Licorn finale smile; fade on last cymbal tap + softened pad matching satisfied exhale. Target 72–84s excerpt with repeating "Quarterfold" hook salvageable standalone loop.

instructions.voice: Keep lead vocal warm, conversational pop clarity; harmonies airy and succinct; mascot-adjacent joy without chanting baby-talk.
instructions.structure: Aim for ~2:20–2:50 full song; chorus hook engineered for 8-bar loopability; bridge halftempo shimmer before final double chorus lift.
instructions.workflowNotes: Paste fields into Suno Custom Mode manually. After generation, operator selects lossless master for streaming + trims vertical excerpt as described. Never auto-upload to distribution from this workspace.

qualityChecks: Lyric prompt forces Suno-authored imagery about fold geometry, crunch, melt, spice snow, skillet hiss without naming protected brands or giving cooking quantities
Music-only styling stays confined to Style of Music field; lyrics remain free of production leakage
Chorus hook concept engineered under 8 seconds for short-form extraction
Energy arc verbally mirrors storyline: brittle hook → savory build → blister climax → satisfied resolve
